query:
SELECT u.name, l.digestType, l.weekKey, l.status, l.itemCount, l.sentAt
FROM userEmailSendLog l
JOIN users u ON u.id = l.userId
WHERE l.digestType = 'monday' 
  AND l.weekKey IN ('2026W19', '2026W20')
  AND u.name IN ('Ryan Pemberton', 'Dan Day')
ORDER BY u.name, l.weekKey;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT u.name, l.digestType, l.weekKey, l.status, l.itemCount, l.sentAt
FROM userEmailSendLog l
JOIN users u ON u.id = l.userId
WHERE l.digestType = 'monday' 
  AND l.weekKey IN ('2026W19', '2026W20')
  AND u.name IN ('Ryan Pemberton', 'Dan Day')
ORDER BY u.name, l.weekKey;
